{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Millennium Falcon'', this is Captain Talpron, leading Squadron Two, Corellian Space Defense Forces Space Service.|[[Talpron]]|<ref name="AaC" />}}
The '''Corellian Defense Forces Space Service''', also known as the '''Corellian navy''' and '''Corellian fleet''', was the [[Navy/Legends|naval]] branch of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]]. It was dedicated to the defense of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] space.

==Organization==
The Corellian Defense Forces Space Service encompassed all the space forces of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] (CDF),<ref name="AaC" /> the armed forces that guarded the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> The fleet had its headquarters in the [[Orbital Industrial Zone]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="SoF" />

The Space Service, along with the rest of the CDF, was led by the ruler of the Corellian sector, namely the [[Governor-General/Legends|Governor-General of the Corellian sector]],<ref name="AaC" /> later replaced by the [[Five World Prime Minister]].<ref name="Betrayal" /> Within the military, the CDF and its Space Service were commanded by the [[Supreme Commander of the Corellian Defense Force]].<ref name="Exile" />

The most notable fleet of the Corellian Defense Forces Space Service was the [[Corellian Home Fleet]], the fleet assigned to the defense of Corellia and the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].<ref name="Tempest" />

Corellian naval officers were awarded a [[Corellian cutlass]] when they attained the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]].<ref name="SoF" />

===Starships===
{{Quote|They have nothing in the size class of Dodonna, but they have Strident-class Star Defenders and a large number of frigates, corvettes, patrol boats, gunships, and heavy transports. Mostly Corellian Engineering Corporation, of course.|A [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] [[Sensor officer/Legends|sensor officer]]|<ref name="Betrayal" />}}
The CDF Space Service used various types of [[Starship/Legends|starships]], mostly manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].<ref name="Betrayal" /> The capital ships included [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]]<ref name="Betrayal" /> (such as the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]<ref name="TCSWE-Silaban">{{CSWECite|III|151|''Silaban''}}</ref> and the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|CR92a ''Assassin''-class corvette]]<ref name="SoF" />), [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]], [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]]<ref name="Betrayal" /> (including assault frigates<ref name="Inferno" />), [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]],<ref name="Bloodlines" /> [[Star Defender]]s (such as the [[Strident-class Star Defender|''Strident''-class Star Defender]]),<ref name="Betrayal" /> [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battle cruisers]],<ref name="Inferno" /> and [[Corellian Dreadnaught|dreadnaughts]].<ref name="Tempest" /> Smaller vessels encompassed [[Patrol ship/Legends|patrol boats]]<ref name="Betrayal" /> (such as the [[Pocket Patrol Boat]]<ref name="SoF" />) and [[Transport/Legends|transports]]<ref name="Betrayal" /> (such as the [[CR20 troop carrier/Legends|CR-20 troop carrier]]<ref name="TCWCG">''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]''</ref>). [[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighter]] models included the [[Light Attack Fighter Model 250]], the [[Heavy/Light Attack Fighter 500]],<ref name="CTD">''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''</ref> the [[CL-1c Lancet interceptor]],<ref name="SoF" /> the [[X-TIE Fighter]],<ref name="SAV">[[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']]</ref> the [[Starfighter/Legends|Corellian attack fighter]] and the [[YT-5100 Shriek-class bomber|YT-5100 ''Shriek''-class bomber]].<ref name="Betrayal" />

In addition, the CDF used ancient models of Imperial starships decades after the end of the Galactic Civil War such as [[TIE series/Legends|TIE series fighters]], [[A-9 Vigilance interceptor]]s, [[A-10 interceptor]]s, [[I-7 Howlrunner]]s, [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]],<ref name="Betrayal" /> [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]] and [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]].<ref name="Fury" />

==History==
In the last centuries of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the Corellian defense force built large warships to defend the sector against exterior threats. Like all big [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] employed in the rich [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] sectors of the Republic, they were fitted with a limited-range [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] so as not to be involved in aggressive military actions.<ref name="AOTC:ICS">''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref>

After the [[Declaration of a New Order]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the Corellian sector became an [[Imperial client state]] loyal to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Although the Corellian Diktat kept the title of Governor-General of the Corellian sector, the control of the Corellian Defense Force was overseen by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of the Corellian sector.<ref name="SoF" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], elements of the Corellian Defense Force were repeatedly sent away to assist the Imperial armed forces against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="CTD" />

Following the death of the Emperor at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], many Imperial loyalists fled the collapsing Empire to take refuge in the Imperial-friendly Corellian sector.<ref name="XW:RS">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref> Former Imperial soldiers extensively joined the Space Service of the Corellian Defense Force.<ref name="AaC" />

Near the end of the Galactic Civil War, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] gained control of the Corellian system after the fall of the Diktat's regime. [[Micamberlecto]], the newly-appointed New Republic Governor-General of the Corellian sector, became the new commander-in-chief of the Corellian Armed Forces. However, Corellian troops, in particular Imperial and Diktat loyalists, were reluctant to obey to a New Republic appointee.<ref name="AaC" /> During the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], the majority of the the CDF Space Service forces betrayed the New Republic.<ref name="AaC" /> Within the very first days of the insurrection, CDF warships, including [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], massively defected to the [[Sacorrian Triad|Triad]] of [[Sacorria]].<ref name="SaC" /> Later, during the takeover of Corellia by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'s [[Human League]], the few remaining Corellian space forces in the Corellian system joined the self-proclaimed Diktat Thrackan Sal-Solo.<ref name="AaC" /> Vessels of the Corellian defense fleet attempted to capture New Republic [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] when she escaped Corellia.<ref name="AaS">''[[Assault at Selonia]]''</ref> The New Republic eventually defeated the Sacorrian Triad that was responsible for the entire conflict at the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]]. There, the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic navy]] annihilated the Sacorrian fleet, including the treacherous CDF space forces.<ref name="SaC" />

Near the end of the Galactic Civil War, vessels of the Corellian Defense Force served in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]] under [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Bel Iblis]].<ref name="SotP">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>

More than a decade later, years after the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Corellian system was ruled by the government of the [[Five Worlds]]. As tensions arose between the Five Worlds and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], a secret fleet of [[Corellian Dreadnaught]] was constructed in the [[Kiris Asteroid Cluster]] in order to augment the existing Corellian space forces.<ref name="Tempest" /> In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] finally erupted between the Galactic Alliance and the Five World when the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Galactic Alliance Navy]] [[Operation Roundabout|invaded]] the Corellian system.<ref name="Betrayal" /> In the first stage of the war, the CDF Space Service, and more particularly the [[Corellian Home Fleet]], was highly involved since the [[Blockade of Corellia|blockaded]] Corellia was the hotspot of the conflict.<ref name="Betrayal" /><ref name="Bloodlines" /><ref name="Exile" /> During [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Operation Noble Savage]], Corellian starfighter squadrons commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] destroyed the Galactic Alliance's bridgehead in the Corellian system.<ref name="Betrayal" /> Around the same time, the Corellian fleet secretly built in the [[Kiris shipyards]] was dispatched far away from the Corellian sector to [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|fight]] in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].<ref name="Tempest" /> Some time later, the war escalated and other worlds joined Corellia in the conflict, forming the [[Confederation]].<ref name="Exile" /> Corellian Defense Force elements were then deployed throughout the galaxy alongside other [[Confederation Fleet|Confederation forces]] to fight against the Galactic Alliance. The CDF navy fought at the [[Battle of Gilatter VIII]],<ref name="Exile" /> at the [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kuat]], at the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]]<ref name="Inferno" /> and at the [[Second Battle of Roche]].<ref name="Invincible" /> At the [[battle of the rendezvous point]], a [[decoy fleet]] of decommissioned Corellian ships was used to lure Galactic Alliance [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and destroy the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]] by firing the [[Centerpoint Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]].<ref name="Fury" /> Eventually, the Second Galactic Civil War ended with the death of Jacen Solo in [[41 ABY]] during the [[Battle of Uroro Station]].<ref name="Invincible" />
